hooks.command: echo 'This session has the Convex plugin. For ANY backend implementation or design ask (API, database, server functions, HTTP endpoints, schema, crons, scheduling, file storage, auth, real-time), use the convex:design skill before writing code and delegate convex/ code to the convex-expert subagent. Hard correctness rules: TypeScript only in convex/ (never .js); HTTP routes live in convex/http.ts wrapped in httpAction imported from ./_generated/server; type-annotate the results of same-file ctx.runQuery/runMutation/runAction calls (TS7022); every function declares args validators with v.* using the exact argument names given. Do NOT add returns: validators unless the project already uses them. Cap every user-facing list read: .take(n) or .paginate — never bare .collect() on a table that grows. Time-ordered listings (logs, feeds, history) are newest-first: add .order("desc") explicitly — the default is ascending.'
